subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Babu'l-Ata [Lawh-i-Banu-Qurayzih]
subcodes.first_line: The atoms of every contingent being and the realities of all created things bear witness that this Servant.... When I was but a child, this Wronged One read an account of the invasion of the Banú-Qurayẓih recorded in a book attributed to the late Mullá Báqir Majlisí.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذرات کائنات شاهد و حقائق ممکنات گواه که این عبد از ظهور و اظهار امر مقصودی جز
subcodes.subjects: @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @personal instructions, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
